data.body: MERGED 519 (3b4e compact/delete/init wiring). 562f(#2) CLOSED (earlier attempt succeeded; output was truncated). 7 BUGS FULLY DONE: #5 #4 #7 #10 #2 + skill. 3b4e ticket close pending: verifier wants per-path index.lock regression tests for delete.py+init.py too (only compact tested) -> small follow-up change needed. Rebased 509(#1) 513(#3) onto new main (519 merge). Remaining original bugs to land: 509 513 515 517 518. Merged Gerrit: 507 508 510 512 514 516 519.
